responsibilities: Design and build low-latency execution systems in C++ to support high-frequency order routing and market data processing
Develop and maintain pricing libraries and analytics engines used by traders for real-time risk and P&L calculations
Optimize trading system performance through profiling, memory management, and reduction of end-to-end latency bottlenecks
Collaborate with quants and traders to implement and productionize new trading strategies into the live trading platform
Build robust market data handlers and order management system components integrating with multiple exchange protocols
Implement automated testing frameworks and CI/CD pipelines to ensure reliability of mission-critical trading infrastructure
Debug and resolve production incidents in real-time trading systems during live market hours with minimal downtime
Architect scalable microservices for trade capture, position keeping, and risk aggregation across multiple asset classes
